title: The Wynncraft Pack
description: JaredH4's Wynncraft Modpack. Designed for Performance and Quality of Life.
body:
# The Wynncraft Pack [Wynncraft](https://wynncraft.com/) modpack designed with performance and quality of life in mind. Mostly based around [Wynntils](https://wynntils.com/) and [Voices of Wynn](https://voicesofwynn.com/), with several quality of life and performance mods.
Also has shaders, shoulder surfing, borderless fullscreen, controller support and dynamic lights. Designed for the Wynncraft MMORPG server (play.wynncraft.com), I have no idea what will happen on a different server. I've provided a fairly basic default config and keybinds, feel free to change them to your personal preferences. ![New HUD from Wynntils](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A4tEPrsB/images/cae162748d2f5f4d443ed673a03dd3cbf0cba2c3.png) ## Mods: Bobby
